diagrams.title: Python Program Structure Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the top-to-bottom execution flow of a typical Python program
diagrams.purpose: Understand the standard layout and execution order of Python programs

diagrams.title: Indentation Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Visual representation of nested code blocks using indentation levels
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how indentation defines code blocks and nesting in Python

diagrams.title: Python Execution Model
diagrams.description: Shows how the interpreter processes code including module imports and function calls
elements: Source code → Lexical analysis → Parsing → Bytecode → Interpreter → Output
Module import happens before main execution
Function calls create new frame on call stack
diagrams.purpose: Understand the compilation and interpretation process in Python
